much calculation with the Hindus in determining the future agricul-

An astronomer should carefully observe the Moon's conjunc-
tion with the asterism presided over by the creator (i.e. RohinI) in
the dark fortnight of Asa<3ha and then predict good or bad effects to
mankind according to the injunctions of the Sastras (scientific
works). The method of finding out by calculation future conjunction
of the Moon with the asterism RohinI has been explained by me
in my astronomical treatise Paficasiddhaniikd. under the head of
"Conjunction with Fixed Stars".
